Flash attention backend provides sliding window support now. We can use it instead of fall back to xformer.

vllm.title: [Frontend][Misc] Goodput metric support
vllm.author: Imss27
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support of goodput metric for benchmarking serving system.
If the user doesn't specify --goodput, request goodput will not be shown.
Supported service level objectives: TTFT, TPOT, E2EL
FIX #8782
Goodput Context
Goodput is defined as the number of completed requests per second that meet
